class I18nService {
  private currentLang: LangCode = 'zh_CN';
  private translations: Record<LangCode, Record<string, string>> = {
    'zh_CN': zh_CN,
    'en_US': en_US,
    // Add placeholders for other languages to fallback to English or partial
    'ja_JP': en_US, 
    'ko_KR': en_US,
    'de_DE': en_US,
    'fr_FR': en_US
  };

  constructor() {
    this.detectLanguage();
  }

  private detectLanguage() {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('app_language') as LangCode;
    if (saved && this.translations[saved]) {
      this.currentLang = saved;
      return;
    }
    const browserLang = navigator.language;
    if (browserLang.includes('zh')) this.currentLang = 'zh_CN';
    else this.currentLang = 'en_US';
  }

  public setLanguage(lang: LangCode) {
    this.currentLang = lang;
    localStorage.setItem('app_language', lang);
  }

  public getCurrentLanguage(): LangCode {
    return this.currentLang;
  }

  public t(key: string): string {
    return this.translations[this.currentLang][key] || this.translations['en_US'][key] || key;
  }
}

export class I18nService {
  private currentLang: LangCode = 'zh_CN';
  private translations: Record<LangCode, Record<string, string>> = {
    'zh_CN': zh_CN,
    'en_US': en_US,
    // Add placeholders for other languages to fallback to English or partial
    'ja_JP': en_US, 
    'ko_KR': en_US,
    'de_DE': en_US,
    'fr_FR': en_US
  };

  constructor() {
    this.detectLanguage();
  }

  private detectLanguage() {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('app_language') as LangCode;
    if (saved && this.translations[saved]) {
      this.currentLang = saved;
      return;
    }
    const browserLang = navigator.language;
    if (browserLang.includes('zh')) this.currentLang = 'zh_CN';
    else this.currentLang = 'en_US';
  }

  public setLanguage(lang: LangCode) {
    this.currentLang = lang;
    localStorage.setItem('app_language', lang);
  }

  public getCurrentLanguage(): LangCode {
    return this.currentLang;
  }

  public t(key: string): string {
    return this.translations[this.currentLang]?.[key] || this.translations['en_US']?.[key] || key;
  }
}

export const i18n = new I18nService();
